_meta.purpose: Deterministic seed database for S5 Soul Mission assembly. This prevents drift by deriving S5 from approved S1/S2/S3/S0 canonical data.
_meta.rule: S5 is not randomly generated. S5 is assembled from approved seeds and fixed templates. AI may only polish approved content without changing meaning.

S1-01.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Initiator: Learn to stabilize power through awareness, rather than accumulating self-worth through constant action. This mission may express through Entrepreneurship, independent leadership, innovation, and pioneering work; In relationships, practice slowing down and co-creating.
S1-01.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「破晓者」的原频：学习以觉知稳定力量，而非以行动累积价值感。 这份使命可以通过适合开创事业、独立领导、创新工作；在关系中需练习放慢脚步与共创来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Finds breakthrough points in chaos
Natural leadership
Moves stagnant energy forward
missionKeywordsZH: 在混乱中找到突破点
天生领导力
推动停滞能量向前流动
S1-01.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Easily restless and impatient; Resists slowing down or stopping; Uses speed as a substitute for self-worth.
S1-01.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：容易躁动、缺乏耐心；抗拒放慢、无法停下来；以速度代替自我价值。
S1-01.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Learn to stabilize power through awareness, rather than accumulating self-worth through constant action.
S1-01.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：学习以觉知稳定力量，而非以行动累积价值感。

S1-02.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Bridge: Learn to protect the self instead of always being the one who supports everyone. This mission may express through Communication, relationship guidance, and cross-disciplinary integration; Carries a natural healing capacity in spiritual work.
S1-02.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「连接者」的原频：学习维护自我，而不是永远做那个“支持所有人”的人。 这份使命可以通过适合沟通、关系辅导、跨领域整合；在灵性工作中具有天然的疗愈能力来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Understands others' motivations well
Restores flow to complex relationships
Connects energies that appear opposite
missionKeywordsZH: 擅长理解他人动机
让复杂的人际关系恢复流动
能将两种看似对立的能量连接起来
S1-02.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Over-empathizes and loses boundaries; Hesitates to express true needs; Fears that saying no will damage relationships.
S1-02.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：容易过度共情、迷失界限；不敢表达真实需求；担心自己一说“不”就会破坏关系。
S1-02.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Learn to protect the self instead of always being the one who supports everyone.
S1-02.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：学习维护自我，而不是永远做那个“支持所有人”的人。

S1-03.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Seer: Ground insight, turn feeling into direction, and bring spirituality into reality. This mission may express through Strategy, innovation, art, and spiritual research; Can become a high-frequency guide who supports others’ awakening.
S1-03.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「预见者」的原频：把洞察落地，把感觉变成方向，把灵性放进现实。 这份使命可以通过适合策略、创新、艺术、灵性研究；能成为指导他人觉醒的高频引导者来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Exceptional insight
Recognizes trends, potential, and hidden motives
Strong expression in creative fields
missionKeywordsZH: 洞察力极高
能识别趋势、潜能与隐形动机
在创造性领域表现突出
S1-03.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Overthinks easily; Feels too much and struggles to ground; Feels different from the world and may become lonely.
S1-03.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：容易过度思考；感受太多、难以落地；觉得自己与世界不同，产生孤独感。
S1-03.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Ground insight, turn feeling into direction, and bring spirituality into reality.
S1-03.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：把洞察落地，把感觉变成方向，把灵性放进现实。

S1-04.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Stabilizer: Learn to remain flexible within stability, allowing structure to serve the soul instead of restricting it. This mission may express through Organization, management, education, healing, and finance; A foundational frequency guardian in teams.
S1-04.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「稳定者」的原频：学会在稳定中保持灵活，让结构服务灵魂，而不是束缚灵魂。 这份使命可以通过适合组织管理、教育、疗愈、财务；是多数团队的“基础频率守护者”来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Provides safety for others
Systematizes and structures chaos
Strong in long-term projects and sustained growth
missionKeywordsZH: 为他人提供安全感
能把混乱系统化、结构化
擅长长期项目与持续性成长
S1-04.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Fears change and resists uncertainty; Over-carries and suppresses needs; Mistakes stability for never making mistakes.
S1-04.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：害怕改变、抗拒不确定；容易过度承担、压抑需求；误以为“稳定＝不能出错”。
S1-04.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Learn to remain flexible within stability, allowing structure to serve the soul instead of restricting it.
S1-04.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：学会在稳定中保持灵活，让结构服务灵魂，而不是束缚灵魂。

S1-05.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Catalyst: Learn to stabilize your own energy before activating others. This mission may express through Teaching, coaching, healing, entrepreneurship, and public expression; A soul accelerator who helps others cross thresholds.
S1-05.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「催化者」的原频：学习在激发他人之前，先稳住自己的能量。 这份使命可以通过适合教学、教练、疗愈、创业、公众表达；是“灵魂加速器”，能帮助他人跨越瓶颈来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Awakens and inspires others
Moves teams forward
Has powerful breakthrough energy at critical moments
missionKeywordsZH: 能点醒他人、启发他人
带动团队前进
在关键时刻具有强力突破能量
S1-05.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: May make others feel pressured; Strong energy can be misunderstood; Often awakens others while neglecting the self.
S1-05.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：容易让他人感到压力；能量过强导致误解；常常“点醒别人，却忽略自己”。
S1-05.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Learn to stabilize your own energy before activating others.
S1-05.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：学习在激发他人之前，先稳住自己的能量。

S1-06.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Healer: Learn to call your energy back to yourself instead of constantly becoming a shelter for others. This mission may express through Healing, counseling, education, and intimacy guidance; An energetic tuner within teams.
S1-06.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「愈合者」的原频：学习把能量收回自己，而不是不断成为他人的避风港。 这份使命可以通过适合疗愈、咨询、教育、亲密关系引导；在团队中是“能量调频者”来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Can heal, listen, and hold space
Highly intuitive emotional insight
People naturally relax in your presence
missionKeywordsZH: 能疗愈、能倾听、能容纳
直觉性极强的情绪洞察
让人接近后自然放松
S1-06.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Easily carries others’ emotions; Uses caring for others to avoid caring for the self; Fears expressing personal needs.
S1-06.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：容易承担他人情绪；以“照顾别人”逃避照顾自己；害怕表达自身需求。
S1-06.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Learn to call your energy back to yourself instead of constantly becoming a shelter for others.
S1-06.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：学习把能量收回自己，而不是不断成为他人的避风港。

S1-07.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Warrior: Learn to let strength become soft instead of always fighting. This mission may express through Leadership, entrepreneurship, athletics, and crisis handling; An awakener of will on the spiritual path.
S1-07.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「坚毅者」的原频：学习让力量变得柔软，而不是永远在对抗。 这份使命可以通过适合领导、创业、运动、危机处理；灵性道路上是“意志的觉醒者”来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Most reliable in crisis
Protects self and loved ones
Can break through limits
missionKeywordsZH: 在危机中最可靠
能保护自己与所爱之人
拥有突破极限的能力
S1-07.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Uses strength as armor; Fears being seen in vulnerability; Turns life into a mode of struggle.
S1-07.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：把坚强当成盔甲；害怕脆弱被看见；把斗争当成生活方式。
S1-07.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Learn to let strength become soft instead of always fighting.
S1-07.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：学习让力量变得柔软，而不是永远在对抗。

S1-08.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Nurturer: Learn to give without betraying yourself. This mission may express through Family healing, psychological care, and community building; An energy bearer in teams.
S1-08.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「承载者」的原频：学习在给予的同时，不背叛自己。 这份使命可以通过适合家庭疗愈、心理照护、社区建设；也是团队的“能量承载者”来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Stabilizes relational space
Brings cohesion to teams
Carries nurturing creativity
missionKeywordsZH: 稳定关系空间
在团队中带来凝聚力
具有养育型创造力
S1-08.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Easily self-sacrifices; Uses giving as a source of worth; Loses boundaries in relationships.
S1-08.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：容易牺牲自我；把“付出”当成价值来源；在关系中容易失去界限。
S1-08.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Learn to give without betraying yourself.
S1-08.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：学习在给予的同时，不背叛自己。

S1-09.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Explorer: Learn to turn exploration into creation instead of remaining only at the level of experience. This mission may express through Innovation, education, travel, technology, and research; A bridge between worlds.
S1-09.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「拓界者」的原频：学习把探索能力转化为创造，而不是永远只停在体验层。 这份使命可以通过适合创新、教育、旅行、科技、研究；能成为“世界之间的桥梁”来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Opens new worlds, perspectives, and paths
Highly adaptable and unafraid of change
Life is full of inspiration and creativity
missionKeywordsZH: 能打开新世界、新视角、新路径
适应力强、不害怕变化
生命充满灵感与创造性
S1-09.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Lacks stability; Easily distracted and inconsistent; Avoids deep commitment.
S1-09.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：缺乏稳定；容易分心，无法长期坚持；逃避深度承诺。
S1-09.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Learn to turn exploration into creation instead of remaining only at the level of experience.
S1-09.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：学习把探索能力转化为创造，而不是永远只停在体验层。

S1-10.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Guardian: Learn to release the responsibility to hold everything, allowing life to move on its own. This mission may express through Safety, management, coordination, strategy, and resource management; An energetic guardian in spiritual work.
S1-10.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「守护者」的原频：学习放下“守住一切”的责任感，让生命自己流动。 这份使命可以通过适合安全、管理、协调、策略、资源管理；在灵性工作中具有“能量护卫者”的角色来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Recognizes danger and energetic imbalance
Brings safety in chaos
Can hold protective space for others
missionKeywordsZH: 能识别危险与能量不平衡
在混乱中带来安全感
能为他人撑起空间
S1-10.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Overprotective and controlling; Does not trust others’ capacity; Clings from fear of abandonment.
S1-10.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：过度保护、过度控制；不信任他人能力；害怕别人离开导致紧抓不放。
S1-10.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Learn to release the responsibility to hold everything, allowing life to move on its own.
S1-10.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：学习放下“守住一切”的责任感，让生命自己流动。

S1-11.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Visionary: Learn to ground vision, not only remain in the future, but begin from the present. This mission may express through Strategy, creative leadership, trend research, and spiritual guidance; A direction-setter who moves human consciousness forward.
S1-11.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「远见者」的原频：学会让愿景落地，不是只停留在“未来”，而是从当下开始。 这份使命可以通过适合策略、创意领导、趋势研究、灵性引导；能成为推动人类意识前进的“方向制定者”来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Designs long-term direction and large-scale strategy
The future eye of an organization or team
Inspires others to see a greater path
missionKeywordsZH: 能设计长期方向与大范围策略
是组织或团队的“未来之眼”
能启发他人看到更大的道路
S1-11.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Thinks too far ahead and ignores present needs; May become stuck because the plan is too large; Impatient with practical details.
S1-11.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：想得太远，忽略当下需要；容易因计划过大而停滞；对行动细节缺乏耐心。
S1-11.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Learn to ground vision, not only remain in the future, but begin from the present.
S1-11.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：学会让愿景落地，不是只停留在“未来”，而是从当下开始。

S1-12.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Empath: Learn to distinguish what belongs to you from what belongs to others. This mission may express through Healing, creation, counseling, and energy work; A key emotional stabilizer within teams.
S1-12.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「感应者」的原频：学会分辨“属于你”与“属于他人的能量”。 这份使命可以通过适合疗愈、创作、咨询、能量工作；也是团队中最重要的“情绪稳定器”来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Sees subtle changes others miss
Natural healing and companionship capacity
Deep empathy and insight in relationships
missionKeywordsZH: 能看见别人看不见的微妙变化
具有天然的疗愈与陪伴能力
在关系中深具同理心与洞察力
S1-12.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Easily overwhelmed by energy; Mistakes others’ emotions for their own; Fears saying no or creating conflict.
S1-12.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：容易被能量淹没；把别人的情绪当成自己的；害怕表达“不”，害怕造成冲突。
S1-12.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Learn to distinguish what belongs to you from what belongs to others.
S1-12.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：学会分辨“属于你”与“属于他人的能量”。

S1-13.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Rebel: Learn to evolve from opposition into creation, letting rebellion become a force of love. This mission may express through Innovation, reform, social advocacy, and spiritual revolution; A powerful archetype for world change.
S1-13.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「逆行者」的原频：学习从“反对”进化为“创造”，让反叛成为爱的力量。 这份使命可以通过适合创新、改革、社会倡议、灵性革命；是推动世界改变的强大原型来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Dismantles old systems
A natural illusion-breaker
Shows the world another way
missionKeywordsZH: 能拆解旧系统
天生的“打破幻相者”
让世界看见另一种道路
S1-13.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Easily develops hostility toward authority; Turns opposition into identity; Feels lonely through conflict with the world.
S1-13.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：容易对权威产生敌意；把反对当成身份；与世界对立而感到孤独。
S1-13.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Learn to evolve from opposition into creation, letting rebellion become a force of love.
S1-13.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：学习从“反对”进化为“创造”，让反叛成为爱的力量。

S1-14.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Teacher: Learn to demonstrate through being, rather than using knowledge to prove worth. This mission may express through Teaching, consulting, content creation, and spiritual work; A wisdom keeper within organizations.
S1-14.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「传导者」的原频：学习“以身示范”，而不是用知识证明价值。 这份使命可以通过适合教学、咨询、内容创作、灵性工作；在组织中是“智慧守护者”来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Deep and stable influence
Opens doors of understanding and awareness for others
Amplifies consciousness in groups
missionKeywordsZH: 影响力深、稳定
能为他人打开理解与觉知之门
在团体中能成为“意识的放大器”
S1-14.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Fears not knowing enough; Falls into perfectionism; Over-carries the teacher role and becomes depleted.
S1-14.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：害怕自己的知识不够；容易进入完美主义；过度承担教学角色导致耗竭。
S1-14.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Learn to demonstrate through being, rather than using knowledge to prove worth.
S1-14.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：学习“以身示范”，而不是用知识证明价值。

S1-15.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Grounded Mystic: Learn to bring spiritual practice into the body, not keep it only in the mind or energy field. This mission may express through Healing, spiritual coaching, guidance, counseling, and strategy; A representative force of practical spirituality.
S1-15.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「入世的灵者」的原频：学习把灵性实践放进身体，而不是停留在头脑或能量层。 这份使命可以通过适合疗愈、灵性教练、指导者、咨询与策略；是“灵性实际化”的代表力量来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Bridges spirituality and reality
Embodies wisdom through practice
One of the most stable frequencies in spiritual teams
missionKeywordsZH: 能桥接灵性与现实
在实践中体现智慧
是灵性团队中最稳定的频率
S1-15.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Impatient with those perceived as less awakened; Neglects bodily needs; Falls out of balance between spirituality and reality.
S1-15.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：容易对“不够觉醒的人”失去耐性；忽略自己的身体需要；在灵性与现实之间失衡。
S1-15.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Learn to bring spiritual practice into the body, not keep it only in the mind or energy field.
S1-15.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：学习把灵性实践放进身体，而不是停留在头脑或能量层。

S1-16.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Harmonizer: Learn to pursue harmony without sacrificing your truth. This mission may express through Coordination, negotiation, management, and interpersonal mediation; An important energetic balancer in teams.
S1-16.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「和谐者」的原频：学习在追求和谐的同时，不牺牲自己的真实。 这份使命可以通过适合协调、谈判、管理、人际调解；是团队的重要“能量平衡器”来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Restores flow to teams or relationships
Sees multiple perspectives and integrates them
Strong empathy and adaptability
missionKeywordsZH: 让团队或关系恢复顺畅
能看见多方观点并整合
拥有极强的共情与适应力
S1-16.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Fears conflict and tends to yield; Falls into the role of maintaining harmony; Suppresses true emotions and becomes depleted.
S1-16.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：害怕冲突、习惯退让；容易陷入“维持和谐”的角色；压抑真实情绪导致能量耗竭。
S1-16.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Learn to pursue harmony without sacrificing your truth.
S1-16.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：学习在追求和谐的同时，不牺牲自己的真实。

S1-17.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Architect: Learn to allow change and let life participate in the design instead of controlling everything yourself. This mission may express through Entrepreneurship, strategy planning, product development, and organizational design; A soul that builds consciousness into form.
S1-17.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「构筑者」的原频：学习允许变化，允许生命也参与设计，而不是全部由你掌控。 这份使命可以通过适合创业、策略规划、产品开发、组织结构设计；在灵性路径上，是将“意识”建成“形态”的灵魂来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Highly capable in execution
Strong at building long-term projects
Can lead teams to create systems from zero to one
missionKeywordsZH: 有高度执行力
构建长期项目的能力突出
能带领团队打造“从零到一”系统
S1-17.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Falls into over-planning; Afraid to begin before things are perfect; Tends to control every detail.
