S1-34.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Reformer: Allow the world to be imperfect, and allow yourself to be imperfect too. This mission may express through Reform, system review, leadership, value restructuring, and spiritual truth work; An energetic source that removes falsehood and restores truth.
S1-34.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「改革者」的原频：允许世界不完美，也允许自己不完美。 这份使命可以通过适合改革者、系统检查、领导、价值观重塑、灵性真理工作；是“破除伪善、恢复真实”的能量源来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Moves teams forward
Skilled in system reform, process optimization, and value-system building
A force of truth-restoration on the spiritual path
missionKeywordsZH: 能推动团队进步
擅长制度改革、流程优化、价值体系建设
在灵性道路中是“去伪存真”的力量
S1-34.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Falls into perfectionism; Overly strict with self; Carries the task of changing the world too heavily.
S1-34.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：容易陷入完美主义；对自己过度严格；把“改变世界”放得太重。
S1-34.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Allow the world to be imperfect, and allow yourself to be imperfect too.
S1-34.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：允许世界不完美，也允许自己不完美。

S1-35.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Soul Navigator: Navigate yourself first, then navigate the world. This mission may express through Soul coaching, mentoring, path guidance, and life direction consulting; A path guardian in spiritual systems.
S1-35.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「灵魂领航者」的原频：先导航自己，再导航世界。 这份使命可以通过适合Soul Coach、导师、路径引导者、人生方向咨询；在灵性系统中，是“路径守护者”来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Decisive and accurate
Becomes a lighthouse of direction for lost groups
Skilled in mission exploration, life planning, and soul path guidance
missionKeywordsZH: 做决策快又准
在迷失的群体中成为方向的灯塔
擅长使命探索、人生规划、灵魂道路引导
S1-35.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Easily decides directions for others; Carries too much responsibility; Forgets one’s own path.
S1-35.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：容易替别人决定方向；扛太多责任；忘记自己的道路。
S1-35.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Navigate yourself first, then navigate the world.
S1-35.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：先导航自己，再导航世界。

S1-36.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Frequency Weaver: Let energy flow naturally instead of forcing it together through yourself. This mission may express through Team frequency tuning, relationship coordination, energy healing, and organizational culture design; A weaver of frequency patterns.
S1-36.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「频率编织者」的原频：让能量自然流动，而不是靠你把它们拼在一起。 这份使命可以通过适合团队调频、关系协调、能量疗愈、组织文化设计；是“频率格局的编织者”来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Aligns team energy toward one direction
Creates harmony, collaboration, and synchronization
A designer of energy flow on the spiritual path
missionKeywordsZH: 能让团队能量调整至同一个方向
擅长创造和谐、协作、同步化
在灵性路径中，是“能量流动的设计者”
S1-36.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Sacrifices self to maintain energy; Overworks in misaligned environments; Treats every imbalance as personal responsibility.
S1-36.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：容易为了维持能量而牺牲自己；在不协调的环境中过度努力；把每个失衡都当成“自己的责任”。
S1-36.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Let energy flow naturally instead of forcing it together through yourself.
S1-36.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：让能量自然流动，而不是靠你把它们拼在一起。

S1-37.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Willpower Flame: Use power, not force; use flame, not burnout. This mission may express through Entrepreneurship, leadership, coaching, project execution, and tactical coordination; An embodiment of will on the spiritual path.
S1-37.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「意志火焰者」的原频：用力量，而非用力；用火焰，而非燃尽。 这份使命可以通过适合创业、领导、教练、项目执行、战术统筹；在灵性道路中，是“意志的体现者”来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Turns ideas into results
Breaks through bottlenecks and resistance
Sustained endurance and fire for mission
missionKeywordsZH: 能将想法变成结果
擅长突破瓶颈、克服阻力
对使命拥有持续的耐力与火力
S1-37.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Overexerts and ignores physical and emotional limits; Mistakes persistence for attachment; Unconsciously turns life into a battlefield.
S1-37.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：容易用力过度，忽略身心极限；把坚持当成执著；无意识把生命变成“战场模式”。
S1-37.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Use power, not force; use flame, not burnout.
S1-37.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：用力量，而非用力；用火焰，而非燃尽。

S1-38.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Soul Listener: As you listen to the world, also listen to yourself. This mission may express through Counseling, healing, soul coaching, and relational accompaniment; A silent guide in spiritual systems.
S1-38.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「灵魂聆听者」的原频：倾听世界的同时，也要倾听自己。 这份使命可以通过适合咨询、疗愈、灵魂教练、关系伴行者；在灵性系统中，是“静默的引导者”来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Skilled in one-on-one deep accompaniment, counseling, and healing
Gently helps others speak truth
Makes others feel safe, understood, and seen
missionKeywordsZH: 擅长一对一深度陪伴、咨询、疗愈
能轻柔地让别人说出真相
让他人感到安全、被理解、被看见
S1-38.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Becomes an emotional outlet for others; Fears expressing true needs; Uses listening to hide vulnerability.
S1-38.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：容易成为他人的“情绪出口”；不敢表达自己真实的需要；用倾听隐藏自己的脆弱。
S1-38.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: As you listen to the world, also listen to yourself.
S1-38.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：倾听世界的同时，也要倾听自己。

S1-39.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Stabilizer: Stability is not restriction; it is the source point of your power. This mission may express through Structural management, long-term projects, family systems, and team support; An earth-frequency guardian on the spiritual path.
S1-39.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「稳定者」的原频：稳定不是束缚，而是你力量的源点。 这份使命可以通过适合结构管理、长期项目、家庭系统、团队支持；在灵性道路中，是“地气的守护者”来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Maintains order in crisis
Provides emotional, decision-making, and structural stability
Strong in long-term projects and sustained building
missionKeywordsZH: 在危机中维持秩序
能提供情绪、决策与结构上的稳定
擅长长期项目与持续性的建设
S1-39.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Receives too much responsibility; Mistakes stability for maintaining everyone’s state; Fears change.
S1-39.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：容易被赋予太多责任；把稳定误以为必须维持所有人的状态；害怕改变。
S1-39.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Stability is not restriction; it is the source point of your power.
S1-39.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：稳定不是束缚，而是你力量的源点。

S1-40.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Inner Sage: Wisdom is to be shared, not carried as responsibility. This mission may express through Teaching, philosophy, spiritual research, and insight-based guidance; A carrier of truth in spiritual systems.
S1-40.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「内在智者」的原频：智慧是分享，而不是责任。 这份使命可以通过适合教学、哲学、灵性研究、洞察型引导者；在灵性系统中，是“真理的携带者”来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Sees the laws and truths of life
Suited to deep guidance of mind and soul
Offers clarity and direction in chaotic times
missionKeywordsZH: 能看透生命的规律与真相
适合给予深度建议、引领心智和灵魂
在混乱的时代提供清晰与方向
S1-40.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Given the role of always being the teacher; Uses wisdom as a shield and avoids weakness; Strong sense of loneliness.
S1-40.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：容易被赋予“必须当老师”的角色；把智慧当成保护层，不愿示弱；孤独感强。
S1-40.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Wisdom is to be shared, not carried as responsibility.
S1-40.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：智慧是分享，而不是责任。

S1-41.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Cosmic Bridge: Let connection arise naturally, not from responsibility. This mission may express through Cross-disciplinary leadership, SoulTech, and work that bridges healing with reality; A bridge soul for transitions between eras.
S1-41.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「宇宙桥接者」的原频：让连接来自自然，而非责任。 这份使命可以通过适合跨界领导、灵性科技（SoulTech）、疗愈与现实融合型工作；在灵性道路中，是“时代转换的桥梁灵魂”来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Turns higher-dimensional wisdom into understandable language
Simplifies complex thoughts, systems, and knowledge
Integrates wisdom from different cultures, disciplines, and spiritual traditions
missionKeywordsZH: 将高维智慧转为可理解的语言
让复杂的思想、系统、知识变得简单
能整合来自不同文化、学科、灵性传统的精华
S1-41.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Over-carries by becoming everyone’s bridge; Feels responsible for communicating all dimensions for the world; Loses center through excessive crossing of boundaries.
S1-41.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：容易过度承担，扮演所有人的桥；觉得自己必须替世界“沟通所有维度”；在过度跨界时失去自身中心。
S1-41.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Let connection arise naturally, not from responsibility.
S1-41.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：让连接来自自然，而非责任。

S1-42.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Ascension Flame: Let your light land instead of remaining suspended above life. This mission may express through Spiritual mentoring, awakening guidance, energy upgrading, and Soul Frequency teachings; An extender of light in spiritual systems.
S1-42.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「承光者」的原频：让你的光落地，而不是悬在半空。 这份使命可以通过适合灵性导师、觉醒引导者、能量升级、Soul Frequency Teachings；在灵性系统中，是“光之延展者”来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: A frequency-lift point in awakening groups
Helps others transcend illusion and break through old karmic patterns
Becomes illuminated in high-energy environments
missionKeywordsZH: 是觉醒团体中的“频率升空点”
能带领他人超越幻相、突破旧业力
在高能量环境中像被点亮一样
S1-42.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Feels lonely because the light is strong; Does not want to be disturbed by low-frequency energy; May be too far ahead for reality to follow.
S1-42.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：容易因为“光太强”而感到孤独；不愿意被低频干扰；有时过于超前，导致现实跟不上。
S1-42.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Let your light land instead of remaining suspended above life.
S1-42.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：让你的光落地，而不是悬在半空。

S1-43.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Destiny Weaver: Seeing destiny is not for control, but for awakening. This mission may express through Life blueprint coaching, Soul Origin Code reading, and karmic research; A weaver of destiny, not a manipulator of it.
S1-43.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「命运编织者」的原频：看见命运不是为了控制，而是为了觉醒。 这份使命可以通过适合生命蓝图教练、Soul Origin Code 解读者、因果研究者；在灵性道路中，是“命运的编织者，而非操纵者”来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Guides others toward key choices that change life patterns
Skilled in lifecycle planning, life blueprint analysis, and soul contract interpretation
Often seen as a destiny mentor in groups
missionKeywordsZH: 能引导他人做出改变命运的关键选择
擅长生命周期规划、生命蓝图分析、灵魂契约解读
在群体中常被视为“命运导师”
S1-43.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Easily decides too much for others; Mistakes seeing destiny for being responsible for destiny; Ignores personal path when seeing too much.
S1-43.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：容易替别人决定太多；误以为“知道命运”就等于“负责命运”；在看见太多时忽略自己的路径。
S1-43.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: Seeing destiny is not for control, but for awakening.
S1-43.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：看见命运不是为了控制，而是为了觉醒。

S1-44.missionSeedEN: Your primary mission is to embody the origin frequency of The Source Messenger: You are a messenger, and you are still human. Truth needs to flow, not be carried as a burden. This mission may express through Truth transmission, spiritual writing, Source-frequency guidance, and awareness system building; An earthly expression of Source frequency.
S1-44.missionSeedZH: 你的主任务是活出「源之信使」的原频：你是信使，但你仍然是人。   真理需要被流动，而不是被扛着。 这份使命可以通过适合真理传导者、灵性写作者、源头频率引导师、觉知体系建设者；是“源头频率在地球的表达者”来表达。
missionKeywordsEN: Speaks truth that reaches directly into the soul
Carries revelatory, inspirational, and spiritual translation capacity
A Source-frequency amplifier in spiritual fields
missionKeywordsZH: 能讲出“直指灵魂”的真理语言
具备启示能力、灵感能力、灵性翻译能力
是灵性场域中的“源头频率放大器”
S1-44.missionShadowEN: The main distortion to integrate is: Feels lonely because few understand; Mission becomes too heavy and life is forgotten; Mistakes being from Source for needing to be perfectly accurate.
S1-44.missionShadowZH: 需要整合的主要阴影是：容易感到孤独，因为很少有人能理解你；使命感太重而忘记生活；把“来自源头”误以为必须“完美无误”。
S1-44.missionActionEN: Practice this mission by living the core lesson: You are a messenger, and you are still human. Truth needs to flow, not be carried as a burden.
S1-44.missionActionZH: 通过这个核心课题来实践使命：你是信使，但你仍然是人。   真理需要被流动，而不是被扛着。

S2-01.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how The other person activates your deepest issues around safety and security. and to move beyond the loop of swinging between fear of abandonment and fear of closeness. The lesson is: Build safety from within yourself, not from the relationship.
S2-01.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：对方触发你最深层的安全感议题。，并走出「害怕被抛弃与害怕被亲近来回摆动。」的循环。核心课题是：建立来自自身的安全，而不是来自关系。
S2-01.relationshipPatternEN: The other person activates your deepest issues around safety and security.
S2-01.relationshipPatternZH: 对方触发你最深层的安全感议题。
S2-01.mirrorShadowEN: Swinging between fear of abandonment and fear of closeness.
S2-01.mirrorShadowZH: 害怕被抛弃与害怕被亲近来回摆动。
S2-01.healingActionZH: 内在小孩的修复与边界练习。
S2-01.formulaNote: Canonical S2 entry exists, but is not reachable by the current birthMonth + birthDay formula.

S2-02.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how Both sides may try to control emotions, timing, direction, or the pace of the relationship. and to move beyond the loop of a recurring cycle of anger and resentment. The lesson is: Release control and practice trust.
S2-02.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：双方互相试图掌控情绪、节奏或方向。，并走出「愤怒与委屈循环。」的循环。核心课题是：放下控制，练习信任。
S2-02.relationshipPatternEN: Both sides may try to control emotions, timing, direction, or the pace of the relationship.
S2-02.relationshipPatternZH: 双方互相试图掌控情绪、节奏或方向。
S2-02.mirrorShadowEN: A recurring cycle of anger and resentment.
S2-02.healingActionEN: Return to the present moment instead of projecting into the future.
S2-02.healingActionZH: 专注当下，而不是预设未来。

S2-03.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how The other person reflects self-denial, self-doubt, or hidden questions around your value. and to move beyond the loop of expecting someone else to prove your worth. The lesson is: Worth is your existence itself, not something granted by recognition.
S2-03.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：对方让你看见自我否定或自我怀疑。，并走出「期待别人证明你的价值。」的循环。核心课题是：价值是存在本身，而不是被认可。
S2-03.relationshipPatternEN: The other person reflects self-denial, self-doubt, or hidden questions around your value.
S2-03.relationshipPatternZH: 对方让你看见自我否定或自我怀疑。
S2-03.mirrorShadowEN: Expecting someone else to prove your worth.
S2-03.mirrorShadowZH: 期待别人证明你的价值。
S2-03.healingActionEN: Disconnect from comparison, shame, and people-pleasing.

S2-04.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how Emotional attachment or energetic merging may easily arise. and to move beyond the loop of switching between separation anxiety and clingy attachment. The lesson is: Practice independence without emotional separation.
S2-04.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：容易产生情感依附或能量融合。，并走出「分离焦虑与黏着关系互相切换。」的循环。核心课题是：练习独立而不分离。
S2-04.relationshipPatternEN: Emotional attachment or energetic merging may easily arise.
S2-04.relationshipPatternZH: 容易产生情感依附或能量融合。
S2-04.mirrorShadowEN: Switching between separation anxiety and clingy attachment.
S2-04.mirrorShadowZH: 分离焦虑与黏着关系互相切换。
S2-04.healingActionEN: Return to your own center of strength.

S2-05.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how Both sides project feared or unowned parts of themselves onto the other. and to move beyond the loop of misunderstanding, blame, and emotional reactions. The lesson is: See the truth behind the projection.
S2-05.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：双方将自己害怕的部分投射到对方身上。，并走出「误会、指责、情绪化反应。」的循环。核心课题是：看见被投射的真相。
S2-05.relationshipPatternEN: Both sides project feared or unowned parts of themselves onto the other.
S2-05.relationshipPatternZH: 双方将自己害怕的部分投射到对方身上。
S2-05.healingActionEN: Notice the fear beneath your first reaction.
S2-05.healingActionZH: 觉察第一反应背后的恐惧。

S2-06.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how There is a repeated need for the other person to prove love or affirmation. and to move beyond the loop of accumulated dissatisfaction and anxiety. The lesson is: Close the pattern of seeking validation outside yourself.
S2-06.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：不断需要对方证明爱或肯定。，并走出「累积不满与焦虑。」的循环。核心课题是：关闭“外求验证”模式。
S2-06.relationshipPatternEN: There is a repeated need for the other person to prove love or affirmation.
S2-06.relationshipPatternZH: 不断需要对方证明爱或肯定。
S2-06.healingActionEN: Turn your attention back toward your own sense of worth.
S2-06.healingActionZH: 将注意力转向自身价值感。

S2-07.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how The other person amplifies your sense of failure or anxiety around goals. and to move beyond the loop of effort → disappointment → more effort → repeated failure. The lesson is: Recognize the illusion of perfection-seeking.
S2-07.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：对方放大你的失败感或目标焦虑。，并走出「努力 → 失望 → 更努力 → 再失败。」的循环。核心课题是：觉察“追求完美”的幻象。
S2-07.relationshipPatternEN: The other person amplifies your sense of failure or anxiety around goals.
S2-07.relationshipPatternZH: 对方放大你的失败感或目标焦虑。
S2-07.mirrorShadowEN: Effort → disappointment → more effort → repeated failure.
S2-07.mirrorShadowZH: 努力 → 失望 → 更努力 → 再失败。

S2-08.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how The relationship becomes a field of comparison, ranking, or rivalry. and to move beyond the loop of win-loss dynamics, superiority, and jealousy. The lesson is: Release comparison consciousness.
S2-08.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：在关系中互相比较高低。，并走出「输赢、优越、嫉妒循环。」的循环。核心课题是：释放比较意识。
S2-08.relationshipPatternEN: The relationship becomes a field of comparison, ranking, or rivalry.
S2-08.relationshipPatternZH: 在关系中互相比较高低。
S2-08.healingActionEN: Practice growing together instead of opposing each other.
S2-08.healingActionZH: 练习共同成长而非对抗。

S2-09.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how The other person activates deep shame, embarrassment, or vulnerability. and to move beyond the loop of hiding yourself → being misunderstood → hiding even more. The lesson is: See the longing for love beneath shame.
S2-09.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：对方触发深层羞耻、尴尬、脆弱。，并走出「隐藏自我 → 被误解 → 更隐藏。」的循环。核心课题是：看见羞耻背后对爱的渴望。
S2-09.relationshipPatternEN: The other person activates deep shame, embarrassment, or vulnerability.
S2-09.relationshipPatternZH: 对方触发深层羞耻、尴尬、脆弱。
S2-09.mirrorShadowEN: Hiding yourself → being misunderstood → hiding even more.
S2-09.mirrorShadowZH: 隐藏自我 → 被误解 → 更隐藏。

S2-10.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how The other person’s distance activates your insecurity. and to move beyond the loop of the more anxious you become, the more distance you may feel. The lesson is: Release expectations around response speed or immediate reassurance.
S2-10.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：对方的距离触发你的不安。，并走出「越焦虑越被疏离。」的循环。核心课题是：放下对“回应速度”的期待。
S2-10.relationshipPatternEN: The other person’s distance activates your insecurity.
S2-10.relationshipPatternZH: 对方的距离触发你的不安。
S2-10.mirrorShadowEN: The more anxious you become, the more distance you may feel.
S2-10.healingActionEN: Learn to stabilize your own energy.

S2-11.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how An imbalance of responsibility appears in the relationship. and to move beyond the loop of one side gives too much while the other withdraws. The lesson is: Notice the need to rescue or be rescued.
S2-11.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：关系中出现不平衡的责任承担。，并走出「一方付出过多，另一方退缩。」的循环。核心课题是：觉察“拯救”或“被拯救”的需求。
S2-11.relationshipPatternEN: An imbalance of responsibility appears in the relationship.
S2-11.relationshipPatternZH: 关系中出现不平衡的责任承担。
S2-11.mirrorShadowEN: One side gives too much while the other withdraws.
S2-11.mirrorShadowZH: 一方付出过多，另一方退缩。

S2-12.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how Conflict, communication, or emotional truth is avoided or frozen. and to move beyond the loop of avoidance → explosion → guilt → avoidance again. The lesson is: Face the truth of the relationship directly.
S2-12.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：避免冲突、逃避沟通、情绪冷冻。，并走出「回避 → 爆发 → 内疚 → 再回避。」的循环。核心课题是：直面关系的真实。
S2-12.relationshipPatternEN: Conflict, communication, or emotional truth is avoided or frozen.
S2-12.relationshipPatternZH: 避免冲突、逃避沟通、情绪冷冻。
S2-12.mirrorShadowZH: 回避 → 爆发 → 内疚 → 再回避。
S2-12.healingActionEN: Use conscious communication instead of silence.

S2-13.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how Both sides are triggered by criticism or perceived judgment. and to move beyond the loop of judgment → self-defense → more judgment. The lesson is: See the fear and insecurity beneath judgment.
S2-13.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：彼此被对方的“评判”触发。，并走出「批判 → 自我防御 → 再批判。」的循环。核心课题是：看见评判背后的恐惧与不安。
S2-13.relationshipPatternEN: Both sides are triggered by criticism or perceived judgment.
S2-13.relationshipPatternZH: 彼此被对方的“评判”触发。
S2-13.mirrorShadowZH: 批判 → 自我防御 → 再批判。

S2-14.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how A strong desire to be seen, recognized, and confirmed arises. and to move beyond the loop of depending on external recognition. The lesson is: Stop handing your value to others.
S2-14.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：渴求被看见与确认。，并走出「依赖外界认可。」的循环。核心课题是：停止将价值交给别人。
S2-14.relationshipPatternEN: A strong desire to be seen, recognized, and confirmed arises.
S2-14.healingActionEN: Return to the strength of your own existence.

S2-15.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how Deep trust issues arise between two people. and to move beyond the loop of suspicion, testing, and emotional tug-of-war. The lesson is: Trust is not only something you give another person; it is something you give yourself.
S2-15.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：两人之间存在深层信任议题。，并走出「怀疑、试探、情绪化拉扯。」的循环。核心课题是：信任不是给予别人，而是给予自己。
S2-15.relationshipPatternEN: Deep trust issues arise between two people.
S2-15.relationshipPatternZH: 两人之间存在深层信任议题。
S2-15.healingActionEN: Practice emotional stability and transparent communication.
S2-15.healingActionZH: 练习情绪稳定与透明沟通。

S2-16.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how The relationship moves through strong emotional highs and lows. and to move beyond the loop of intense closeness → cool distance → intense closeness again. The lesson is: Find a stable frequency instead of emotional intensity.
S2-16.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：关系强烈起伏。，并走出「激烈亲密 → 冷静疏离 → 再激烈。」的循环。核心课题是：找到稳定频率，而不是情绪浓度。
S2-16.relationshipPatternEN: The relationship moves through strong emotional highs and lows.
S2-16.mirrorShadowEN: Intense closeness → cool distance → intense closeness again.
S2-16.mirrorShadowZH: 激烈亲密 → 冷静疏离 → 再激烈。
S2-16.healingActionEN: Stop relying on intensity to confirm love.
S2-16.healingActionZH: 不再依赖“强烈感”来确认爱。

S2-17.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how It is difficult to establish or respect personal boundaries. and to move beyond the loop of intrusion, control, and energetic pulling. The lesson is: Build clear boundaries.
S2-17.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：难以建立或尊重个人界限。，并走出「被侵入、被控制、被拉扯。」的循环。核心课题是：建立清晰界限。
S2-17.relationshipPatternEN: It is difficult to establish or respect personal boundaries.
S2-17.relationshipPatternZH: 难以建立或尊重个人界限。

S2-18.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how Both sides trigger career, achievement, or goal-related anxiety. and to move beyond the loop of not enough → pushing harder → exhaustion → self-denial. The lesson is: Release the pressure of having to be strong all the time.
S2-18.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：彼此触发事业或目标焦虑。，并走出「不够好 → 冲刺 → 疲惫 → 否定。」的循环。核心课题是：放下“必须很强”的压力。
S2-18.relationshipPatternEN: Both sides trigger career, achievement, or goal-related anxiety.
S2-18.relationshipPatternZH: 彼此触发事业或目标焦虑。
S2-18.mirrorShadowEN: Not enough → pushing harder → exhaustion → self-denial.
S2-18.mirrorShadowZH: 不够好 → 冲刺 → 疲惫 → 否定。
S2-18.healingActionEN: Thank yourself for the stage you are currently in.

S2-19.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how You may fear expressing yourself, or feel misunderstood when you do. and to move beyond the loop of suppression → explosion → guilt → suppression again. The lesson is: Allow truth to move through you.
S2-19.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：害怕表达自己，或表达被误解。，并走出「压抑 → 爆发 → 内疚 → 再压抑。」的循环。核心课题是：允许真实流动。
S2-19.relationshipPatternEN: You may fear expressing yourself, or feel misunderstood when you do.
S2-19.relationshipPatternZH: 害怕表达自己，或表达被误解。
S2-19.mirrorShadowZH: 压抑 → 爆发 → 内疚 → 再压抑。

S2-20.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how Attachment styles become amplified in the relationship. and to move beyond the loop of anxious attachment and avoidant attachment attract and activate each other. The lesson is: Healing attachment is not about changing the other person; it is about changing your relationship to yourself.
S2-20.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：关系中的依恋风格被放大。，并走出「不安依恋与逃避依恋互相吸引。」的循环。核心课题是：治愈依恋不是改变对方，而是改变自己。
S2-20.relationshipPatternEN: Attachment styles become amplified in the relationship.
S2-20.relationshipPatternZH: 关系中的依恋风格被放大。
S2-20.mirrorShadowEN: Anxious attachment and avoidant attachment attract and activate each other.
S2-20.mirrorShadowZH: 不安依恋与逃避依恋互相吸引。
S2-20.healingActionEN: Learn to stabilize your emotional system.
S2-20.healingActionZH: 学习稳定自己的情绪系统。

S2-21.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how Both people’s emotions strongly affect each other and may pull each other’s energy. and to move beyond the loop of absorbing another person’s emotions → losing center → relational confusion. The lesson is: Practice distinguishing what belongs to you from what belongs to the other person.
S2-21.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：双方情绪互相影响，容易被彼此能量拉动。，并走出「吸收他人情绪 → 失去中心 → 关系混乱。」的循环。核心课题是：练习分辨“这是我的”还是“这是对方的”。
S2-21.relationshipPatternEN: Both people’s emotions strongly affect each other and may pull each other’s energy.
S2-21.relationshipPatternZH: 双方情绪互相影响，容易被彼此能量拉动。
S2-21.mirrorShadowEN: Absorbing another person’s emotions → losing center → relational confusion.
S2-21.mirrorShadowZH: 吸收他人情绪 → 失去中心 → 关系混乱。
S2-21.healingActionZH: 情绪界限与能量中心练习。

S2-22.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how High expectations for the relationship can lead to frequent disappointment. and to move beyond the loop of higher expectations → deeper disappointment → even higher expectations. The lesson is: Release role expectations placed on the other person.
S2-22.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：对关系有高度期待，导致频繁失望。，并走出「期待越高 → 失望越深 → 更高期待。」的循环。核心课题是：放下对对方的角色期待。
S2-22.relationshipPatternEN: High expectations for the relationship can lead to frequent disappointment.
S2-22.relationshipPatternZH: 对关系有高度期待，导致频繁失望。
S2-22.mirrorShadowEN: Higher expectations → deeper disappointment → even higher expectations.
S2-22.mirrorShadowZH: 期待越高 → 失望越深 → 更高期待。
S2-22.healingActionEN: Return to the truth of the connection in the present moment.

S2-23.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how One side gives more than the other. and to move beyond the loop of unconditional giving → being overlooked → hurt → giving even more. The lesson is: Stop using giving as a way to earn worth.
S2-23.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：总是由一方付出较多。，并走出「无条件付出 → 被忽略 → 受伤 → 更付出。」的循环。核心课题是：停止用付出来换取价值。
S2-23.relationshipPatternEN: One side gives more than the other.
S2-23.mirrorShadowEN: Unconditional giving → being overlooked → hurt → giving even more.
S2-23.mirrorShadowZH: 无条件付出 → 被忽略 → 受伤 → 更付出。

S2-24.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how One person suppresses emotions while the other explodes. and to move beyond the loop of suppression → endurance → explosion → guilt. The lesson is: Emotions need to be seen, not pushed down.
S2-24.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：一方压抑，一方爆发。，并走出「压抑 → 忍耐 → 爆发 → 内疚。」的循环。核心课题是：情绪需要被看见，而不是被压住。
S2-24.relationshipPatternEN: One person suppresses emotions while the other explodes.
S2-24.mirrorShadowZH: 压抑 → 忍耐 → 爆发 → 内疚。

S2-25.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how You may feel valuable only when the other person needs you. and to move beyond the loop of self-sacrifice → temporary sense of value → depletion. The lesson is: Value comes from existence, not dependency.
S2-25.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：你觉得被对方需要才有价值。，并走出「牺牲自己 → 获得短暂价值感 → 耗尽。」的循环。核心课题是：价值来自存在，而不是被依赖。
S2-25.relationshipPatternEN: You may feel valuable only when the other person needs you.
S2-25.relationshipPatternZH: 你觉得被对方需要才有价值。
S2-25.mirrorShadowEN: Self-sacrifice → temporary sense of value → depletion.
S2-25.mirrorShadowZH: 牺牲自己 → 获得短暂价值感 → 耗尽。
S2-25.healingActionEN: Disconnect from the illusion that being needed equals being loved.
S2-25.healingActionZH: 断开“被需要等于被爱”的幻象。

S2-26.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how You are deeply triggered when the other person does not understand your feelings. and to move beyond the loop of being denied → arguing → feeling even more denied. The lesson is: Your emotions do not need approval from others.
S2-26.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：对方不理解你的感受时被深深触发。，并走出「被否认 → 争辩 → 更被否认。」的循环。核心课题是：你的情绪不需要他人批准。
S2-26.relationshipPatternEN: You are deeply triggered when the other person does not understand your feelings.
S2-26.relationshipPatternZH: 对方不理解你的感受时被深深触发。
S2-26.mirrorShadowEN: Being denied → arguing → feeling even more denied.
S2-26.mirrorShadowZH: 被否认 → 争辩 → 更被否认。
S2-26.healingActionEN: Practice expression instead of fighting to be validated.

S2-27.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how The relationship creates a strong awakening effect. and to move beyond the loop of intimacy → activation → distance → closeness again. The lesson is: Activation is an entrance into awakening.
S2-27.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：关系带来强烈觉醒效应。，并走出「亲密 → 触发 → 疏离 → 再靠近。」的循环。核心课题是：触发是觉醒的入口。
S2-27.relationshipPatternEN: The relationship creates a strong awakening effect.
S2-27.relationshipPatternZH: 关系带来强烈觉醒效应。
S2-27.mirrorShadowZH: 亲密 → 触发 → 疏离 → 再靠近。
S2-27.healingActionEN: Allow the shock to become growth.

S2-28.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how The other person activates wounds from past relationships. and to move beyond the loop of past pain → projection → conflict → repetition. The lesson is: Recognize: this is an old wound.
S2-28.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：对方触发你过去关系的创伤。，并走出「过去 → 投射 → 冲突 → 重演。」的循环。核心课题是：识别“这是旧伤”。
S2-28.relationshipPatternEN: The other person activates wounds from past relationships.
S2-28.relationshipPatternZH: 对方触发你过去关系的创伤。
S2-28.mirrorShadowZH: 过去 → 投射 → 冲突 → 重演。
S2-28.healingActionEN: Respond to old pain in a new way.
S2-28.healingActionZH: 用新的方式回应旧的痛。

S2-29.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how You fear deep intimacy, yet also fear losing the connection. and to move beyond the loop of longing to be close → withdrawing once closeness appears. The lesson is: Notice the fear connected to intimacy.
S2-29.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：害怕深入亲密，却害怕失去。，并走出「渴望靠近 → 一靠近就退缩。」的循环。核心课题是：觉察与亲密相关的恐惧。
S2-29.relationshipPatternEN: You fear deep intimacy, yet also fear losing the connection.
S2-29.relationshipPatternZH: 害怕深入亲密，却害怕失去。
S2-29.mirrorShadowEN: Longing to be close → withdrawing once closeness appears.
S2-29.mirrorShadowZH: 渴望靠近 → 一靠近就退缩。
S2-29.healingActionEN: Practice opening slowly rather than forcing yourself.
S2-29.healingActionZH: 慢慢练习敞开，而不是强迫。

S2-30.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how You may hold unrealistically high standards for the relationship or the other person. and to move beyond the loop of not good enough → disappointment → criticism → repair → disappointment again. The lesson is: Perfection is an illusion. Reality is the strength.
S2-30.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：对关系和对方要求过高。，并走出「不够好 → 失望 → 批判 → 修复 → 再失望。」的循环。核心课题是：完美是幻象，真实才是力量。
S2-30.relationshipPatternEN: You may hold unrealistically high standards for the relationship or the other person.
S2-30.relationshipPatternZH: 对关系和对方要求过高。
S2-30.mirrorShadowEN: Not good enough → disappointment → criticism → repair → disappointment again.
S2-30.mirrorShadowZH: 不够好 → 失望 → 批判 → 修复 → 再失望。

S2-31.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how You do not speak your needs, yet expect the other person to understand them. and to move beyond the loop of not speaking → not being met → anger → more silence. The lesson is: Needs can only be understood when they are expressed.
S2-31.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：你不说需求，却期待对方懂你。，并走出「不说 → 不被满足 → 生气 → 更不说。」的循环。核心课题是：需求被说出来才会被理解。
S2-31.relationshipPatternEN: You do not speak your needs, yet expect the other person to understand them.
S2-31.relationshipPatternZH: 你不说需求，却期待对方懂你。
S2-31.mirrorShadowEN: Not speaking → not being met → anger → more silence.
S2-31.mirrorShadowZH: 不说 → 不被满足 → 生气 → 更不说。

S2-32.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how Love is equated with contribution, usefulness, or value exchange. and to move beyond the loop of giving to receive love → not receiving → giving even more. The lesson is: Love is not a transaction.
S2-32.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：爱被等同于贡献或价值。，并走出「付出换爱 → 得不到 → 更加付出。」的循环。核心课题是：爱不是交换。
S2-32.relationshipPatternEN: Love is equated with contribution, usefulness, or value exchange.
S2-32.relationshipPatternZH: 爱被等同于贡献或价值。
S2-32.mirrorShadowEN: Giving to receive love → not receiving → giving even more.
S2-32.mirrorShadowZH: 付出换爱 → 得不到 → 更加付出。
S2-32.healingActionZH: 练习无条件的自我接纳。

S2-33.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how Emotions pull each other back and forth, with one side high and the other low. and to move beyond the loop of emotional reaction → calm → emotional reaction again. The lesson is: Emotion is not the truth; it is a response.
S2-33.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：情绪互相拉扯，一高一低。，并走出「情绪化 → 冷静 → 情绪化 → 循环。」的循环。核心课题是：情绪不是真相，只是反应。
S2-33.relationshipPatternEN: Emotions pull each other back and forth, with one side high and the other low.
S2-33.relationshipPatternZH: 情绪互相拉扯，一高一低。
S2-33.mirrorShadowEN: Emotional reaction → calm → emotional reaction again.
S2-33.mirrorShadowZH: 情绪化 → 冷静 → 情绪化 → 循环。
S2-33.healingActionEN: Build the position of an emotional observer.

S2-34.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how The other person’s sense of achievement activates anxiety in you. and to move beyond the loop of inferiority → avoidance → more inferiority. The lesson is: Another person’s success is not your failure.
S2-34.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：对方的成就感让你焦虑。，并走出「自卑 → 逃避 → 再自卑。」的循环。核心课题是：别人的成功不是你的失败。
S2-34.relationshipPatternEN: The other person’s sense of achievement activates anxiety in you.
S2-34.relationshipPatternZH: 对方的成就感让你焦虑。
S2-34.mirrorShadowZH: 自卑 → 逃避 → 再自卑。

S2-35.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how You keep trying to confirm whether the other person is satisfied with you. and to move beyond the loop of pleasing → temporary harmony → inner emptiness. The lesson is: People-pleasing comes from fear of rejection.
S2-35.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：你总想确认对方是否满意。，并走出「取悦 → 短暂和谐 → 内心空虚。」的循环。核心课题是：讨好来自害怕被拒绝。
S2-35.relationshipPatternEN: You keep trying to confirm whether the other person is satisfied with you.
S2-35.relationshipPatternZH: 你总想确认对方是否满意。
S2-35.mirrorShadowZH: 取悦 → 短暂和谐 → 内心空虚。
S2-35.healingActionEN: Do not flatter, perform, or accommodate at the cost of truth.

S2-36.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how The other person repeatedly challenges your fixed patterns. and to move beyond the loop of being challenged → resisting → being challenged again. The lesson is: Every challenge is an invitation to grow.
S2-36.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：对方不断挑战你固有模式。，并走出「被挑战 → 抵抗 → 再被挑战。」的循环。核心课题是：每一次挑战都是成长邀请。
S2-36.relationshipPatternEN: The other person repeatedly challenges your fixed patterns.
S2-36.relationshipPatternZH: 对方不断挑战你固有模式。
S2-36.mirrorShadowEN: Being challenged → resisting → being challenged again.
S2-36.mirrorShadowZH: 被挑战 → 抵抗 → 再被挑战。
S2-36.healingActionZH: 放下防御，采用开放心态。

S2-37.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how The relationship makes you question your direction and sense of meaning. and to move beyond the loop of doubt → self-denial → giving up → doubt again. The lesson is: Meaning comes from within, not from another person.
S2-37.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：关系让你质疑自我方向。，并走出「怀疑 → 否定 → 放弃 → 再怀疑。」的循环。核心课题是：意义来自内心，而非他人。
S2-37.relationshipPatternEN: The relationship makes you question your direction and sense of meaning.
S2-37.relationshipPatternZH: 关系让你质疑自我方向。
S2-37.mirrorShadowEN: Doubt → self-denial → giving up → doubt again.
S2-37.mirrorShadowZH: 怀疑 → 否定 → 放弃 → 再怀疑。
S2-37.healingActionEN: Redefine the value of your existence.
S2-37.healingActionZH: 重新定义你的存在价值。

S2-38.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how Even within relationship, you may still feel lonely. and to move beyond the loop of seeking closeness → still feeling lonely → craving more closeness. The lesson is: Loneliness is the soul calling you back to yourself.
S2-38.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：即使在关系中，你也感到孤独。，并走出「寻求靠近 → 依然孤独 → 更渴望靠近。」的循环。核心课题是：孤独是灵魂呼唤你回归自身。
S2-38.relationshipPatternEN: Even within relationship, you may still feel lonely.
S2-38.relationshipPatternZH: 即使在关系中，你也感到孤独。
S2-38.mirrorShadowEN: Seeking closeness → still feeling lonely → craving more closeness.
S2-38.mirrorShadowZH: 寻求靠近 → 依然孤独 → 更渴望靠近。

S2-39.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how You place the other person on a pedestal. and to move beyond the loop of admiration → disappointment → devaluation → admiration again. The lesson is: See reality instead of fantasy.
S2-39.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：你将对方放在神坛。，并走出「崇拜 → 失望 → 贬低 → 再崇拜。」的循环。核心课题是：看见真实，而不是幻想。
S2-39.relationshipPatternEN: You place the other person on a pedestal.
S2-39.mirrorShadowZH: 崇拜 → 失望 → 贬低 → 再崇拜。
S2-39.healingActionEN: Allow the other person to be human, not an ideal.
S2-39.healingActionZH: 允许对方是人，不是理想。

S2-40.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how You over-submit to the other person’s emotions. and to move beyond the loop of submission → resentment → explosion → guilt → submission again. The lesson is: Submission is not gentleness; it is fear.
S2-40.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：过度顺从对方的情绪。，并走出「顺从 → 不满 → 爆发 → 内疚 → 再顺从。」的循环。核心课题是：顺从不是温柔，是恐惧。
S2-40.relationshipPatternEN: You over-submit to the other person’s emotions.
S2-40.mirrorShadowEN: Submission → resentment → explosion → guilt → submission again.
S2-40.mirrorShadowZH: 顺从 → 不满 → 爆发 → 内疚 → 再顺从。

S2-41.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how You continually sacrifice yourself for the relationship. and to move beyond the loop of sacrifice → pain → being overlooked → more sacrifice. The lesson is: Stop equating love with endurance.
S2-41.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：你为了关系不断牺牲自己。，并走出「牺牲 → 痛苦 → 被忽略 → 更牺牲。」的循环。核心课题是：停止把爱等于忍耐。
S2-41.relationshipPatternEN: You continually sacrifice yourself for the relationship.
S2-41.relationshipPatternZH: 你为了关系不断牺牲自己。
S2-41.mirrorShadowEN: Sacrifice → pain → being overlooked → more sacrifice.
S2-41.mirrorShadowZH: 牺牲 → 痛苦 → 被忽略 → 更牺牲。
S2-41.healingActionEN: Care for yourself before caring for the relationship.
S2-41.healingActionZH: 照顾自己先于照顾关系。

S2-42.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how You fear being rejected, so you keep withdrawing. and to move beyond the loop of not expressing → not being seen → deeper fear. The lesson is: Rejection is not a denial of who you are.
S2-42.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：你害怕被拒绝，因此不断退缩。，并走出「不表达 → 不被看见 → 更害怕。」的循环。核心课题是：拒绝不是否定你的人。
S2-42.relationshipPatternEN: You fear being rejected, so you keep withdrawing.
S2-42.relationshipPatternZH: 你害怕被拒绝，因此不断退缩。
S2-42.mirrorShadowEN: Not expressing → not being seen → deeper fear.
S2-42.mirrorShadowZH: 不表达 → 不被看见 → 更害怕。

S2-43.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how Both sides may easily accuse or blame each other. and to move beyond the loop of accusation → defense → accusation again. The lesson is: The pain behind accusation needs to be understood.
S2-43.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：双方容易互相控诉或责怪。，并走出「控诉 → 防御 → 再控诉。」的循环。核心课题是：控诉背后的痛需要被理解。
S2-43.relationshipPatternEN: Both sides may easily accuse or blame each other.
S2-43.relationshipPatternZH: 双方容易互相控诉或责怪。
S2-43.mirrorShadowZH: 控诉 → 防御 → 再控诉。
S2-43.healingActionEN: Release blame and repair relationship through relationship.
S2-43.healingActionZH: 放下指责，用关系修复关系。

S2-44.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how The other person makes you repeatedly feel guilty or burdened. and to move beyond the loop of guilt → compensation → exhaustion → more guilt. The lesson is: Guilt is not love; it is fear that has not moved.
S2-44.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：对方让你不断感到内疚或负担。，并走出「愧疚 → 补偿 → 疲惫 → 更愧疚。」的循环。核心课题是：愧疚不是爱，是滞留的恐惧。
S2-44.relationshipPatternEN: The other person makes you repeatedly feel guilty or burdened.
S2-44.relationshipPatternZH: 对方让你不断感到内疚或负担。
S2-44.mirrorShadowZH: 愧疚 → 补偿 → 疲惫 → 更愧疚。
S2-44.formulaNote: Canonical S2 entry exists, but is not reachable by the current birthMonth + birthDay formula.

S2-45.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how You feel ignored, misunderstood, or emotionally unseen. and to move beyond the loop of not being cared for → anger → coldness → being hurt again. The lesson is: Seeking attention is an old wound calling for care.
S2-45.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：你感受自己被忽略、被误解。，并走出「不被在意 → 生气 → 冷漠 → 再受伤。」的循环。核心课题是：寻求注意力是旧伤的呼救。
S2-45.relationshipPatternEN: You feel ignored, misunderstood, or emotionally unseen.
S2-45.relationshipPatternZH: 你感受自己被忽略、被误解。
S2-45.mirrorShadowEN: Not being cared for → anger → coldness → being hurt again.
S2-45.mirrorShadowZH: 不被在意 → 生气 → 冷漠 → 再受伤。
S2-45.formulaNote: Canonical S2 entry exists, but is not reachable by the current birthMonth + birthDay formula.

S2-46.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how The relationship moves at different speeds; one person moves faster, the other slower. and to move beyond the loop of pushing → the other withdraws → pushing harder. The lesson is: Respect differences in rhythm.
S2-46.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：关系进度不一致，一方快一方慢。，并走出「推 → 对方退 → 更推。」的循环。核心课题是：尊重节奏差异。
S2-46.relationshipPatternEN: The relationship moves at different speeds; one person moves faster, the other slower.
S2-46.relationshipPatternZH: 关系进度不一致，一方快一方慢。
S2-46.mirrorShadowEN: Pushing → the other withdraws → pushing harder.
S2-46.mirrorShadowZH: 推 → 对方退 → 更推。
S2-46.healingActionEN: Move from needing a result back to needing truth.
S2-46.healingActionZH: 从“需要结果”回到“需要真实”。
S2-46.formulaNote: Canonical S2 entry exists, but is not reachable by the current birthMonth + birthDay formula.

S2-47.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how The relationship activates deep self-doubt. and to move beyond the loop of doubt → avoidance → more doubt. The lesson is: See that the fear behind doubt is not who you are.
S2-47.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：关系触发你的深度自我怀疑。，并走出「怀疑 → 回避 → 更怀疑。」的循环。核心课题是：看见怀疑背后的恐惧不是你。
S2-47.relationshipPatternZH: 关系触发你的深度自我怀疑。
S2-47.mirrorShadowZH: 怀疑 → 回避 → 更怀疑。
S2-47.formulaNote: Canonical S2 entry exists, but is not reachable by the current birthMonth + birthDay formula.

S2-48.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how The other person’s relationship to commitment activates your insecurity. and to move beyond the loop of wanting commitment → demanding it → the other withdraws. The lesson is: Commitment cannot be demanded. It can only be chosen.
S2-48.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：对方的承诺议题触发你的不安。，并走出「想要承诺 → 越要求对方越退缩。」的循环。核心课题是：承诺不能被要求，只能被选择。
S2-48.relationshipPatternEN: The other person’s relationship to commitment activates your insecurity.
S2-48.relationshipPatternZH: 对方的承诺议题触发你的不安。
S2-48.mirrorShadowEN: Wanting commitment → demanding it → the other withdraws.
S2-48.mirrorShadowZH: 想要承诺 → 越要求对方越退缩。
S2-48.healingActionEN: Let commitment grow from free choice.
S2-48.healingActionZH: 让承诺从自由选择中生长。
S2-48.formulaNote: Canonical S2 entry exists, but is not reachable by the current birthMonth + birthDay formula.

S2-49.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how You fear investing too deeply or too quickly. and to move beyond the loop of withdrawal → longing → withdrawal again. The lesson is: Recognize that fear of investment is a protective mechanism.
S2-49.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：害怕投入太深、太快。，并走出「退缩 → 渴望 → 再退缩。」的循环。核心课题是：觉察投入恐惧是保护机制。
S2-49.relationshipPatternEN: You fear investing too deeply or too quickly.
S2-49.mirrorShadowZH: 退缩 → 渴望 → 再退缩。
S2-49.healingActionEN: Open slowly instead of forcing yourself forward.
S2-49.healingActionZH: 慢慢打开，而非强迫前进。
S2-49.formulaNote: Canonical S2 entry exists, but is not reachable by the current birthMonth + birthDay formula.

S2-50.mirrorTaskSeedEN: Your mirror task is to recognize how The other person activates the deepest growth lessons of your soul. and to move beyond the loop of intimacy → activation → separation → deeper connection. The lesson is: A soulmate is not perfection. A soulmate is awakening.
S2-50.mirrorTaskSeedZH: 你的镜像任务是看见：对方激活你灵魂最深的成长课题。，并走出「亲密 → 触发 → 分离 → 更深连接。」的循环。核心课题是：灵魂伴侣不是完美，而是觉醒。
S2-50.relationshipPatternEN: The other person activates the deepest growth lessons of your soul.
S2-50.relationshipPatternZH: 对方激活你灵魂最深的成长课题。
S2-50.mirrorShadowZH: 亲密 → 触发 → 分离 → 更深连接。
S2-50.healingActionEN: Take responsibility for your own growth within love.
S2-50.healingActionZH: 在爱中承担自己的成长。
S2-50.formulaNote: Canonical S2 entry exists, but is not reachable by the current birthMonth + birthDay formula.

S3-01.carrierSeedEN: Your mission is carried through the Seed vibration: Early-stage energy, tender soul development, high sensitivity, and a strong tendency to be influenced by the external field. This tier seeks safety, steadiness, and supportive structure. This carrier matures through: Build inner safety, practice emotional awareness, and do not rush beyond the current stage. Allow yourself to be a seed that grows steadily.
S3-01.carrierSeedZH: 你的使命会通过「种子」的振动来承载：初生能量、灵魂幼化、敏感度高、容易受外界影响。渴望安全感与稳定结构。 这个承载方式需要通过以下方向成熟：建立内在安全感，练习觉知情绪，不急着跨越阶段；允许自己是一颗种子，慢慢生长。
S3-01.expressionModeEN: Early-stage energy, tender soul development, high sensitivity, and a strong tendency to be influenced by the external field. This tier seeks safety, steadiness, and supportive structure.
S3-01.expressionModeZH: 初生能量、灵魂幼化、敏感度高、容易受外界影响。渴望安全感与稳定结构。
S3-01.distortionRiskEN: Dependency, fear of invalidation, unstable frequency, and emotional susceptibility to external influence.
S3-01.distortionRiskZH: 容易依赖、害怕被否定、频率不稳定、情绪容易被带走。
S3-01.groundingActionEN: Build inner safety, practice emotional awareness, and do not rush beyond the current stage. Allow yourself to be a seed that grows steadily.
S3-01.groundingActionZH: 建立内在安全感，练习觉知情绪，不急着跨越阶段；允许自己是一颗种子，慢慢生长。

S3-02.carrierSeedEN: Your mission is carried through the Spark vibration: The inner spark of awakening begins to appear, bringing strong curiosity toward spirituality, truth, and meaning. This carrier matures through: Practice discerning motivation. Learn to distinguish ego impulse from soul movement, and let every inspiration pass through awareness before action.
S3-02.carrierSeedZH: 你的使命会通过「火花」的振动来承载：内心开始出现觉醒火花，对灵性、真理、意义有强烈好奇心。 这个承载方式需要通过以下方向成熟：练习辨识动机，区分小我冲动与灵魂推动，让每一次灵感都经过觉知过滤。
S3-02.expressionModeEN: The inner spark of awakening begins to appear, bringing strong curiosity toward spirituality, truth, and meaning.
S3-02.expressionModeZH: 内心开始出现觉醒火花，对灵性、真理、意义有强烈好奇心。
S3-02.distortionRiskEN: Self-doubt, fear of taking the wrong path, repeated dualistic judgment, and susceptibility to the opinions or energy of others.
S3-02.distortionRiskZH: 频繁否定自己、害怕走错路、反复陷入二元判断、容易被他人影响。
S3-02.groundingActionEN: Practice discerning motivation. Learn to distinguish ego impulse from soul movement, and let every inspiration pass through awareness before action.
S3-02.groundingActionZH: 练习辨识动机，区分小我冲动与灵魂推动，让每一次灵感都经过觉知过滤。

S3-03.carrierSeedEN: Your mission is carried through the Explorer vibration: The soul enters an exploratory stage, learning different systems, methods, and streams of wisdom. This carrier matures through: Practice stabilizing your center. Choose one path to deepen rather than being pulled away by the endless search for more.
S3-03.carrierSeedZH: 你的使命会通过「探索者」的振动来承载：进入探索阶段，开始学习不同体系、方法、智慧。 这个承载方式需要通过以下方向成熟：练习稳定中心，选择一条路深入，不再被“外面更多东西”吸走。
S3-03.expressionModeEN: The soul enters an exploratory stage, learning different systems, methods, and streams of wisdom.
S3-03.expressionModeZH: 进入探索阶段，开始学习不同体系、方法、智慧。
S3-03.distortionRiskEN: Getting lost in too many systems, becoming scattered, and mistaking the pursuit of more information for depth.
S3-03.distortionRiskZH: 容易迷失、体系混乱、追求“更多”导致分散。
S3-03.groundingActionEN: Practice stabilizing your center. Choose one path to deepen rather than being pulled away by the endless search for more.
S3-03.groundingActionZH: 练习稳定中心，选择一条路深入，不再被“外面更多东西”吸走。

S3-04.carrierSeedEN: Your mission is carried through the Awakener vibration: Soul awakening begins to manifest. The person starts seeing through illusion and understanding the logic of energy. This carrier matures through: Awakening is not superiority; awakening is service. Let awakening return to ordinary life and let truth illuminate the simplest places.
S3-04.carrierSeedZH: 你的使命会通过「觉醒者」的振动来承载：灵魂觉醒正在显化，开始看破幻相、理解能量逻辑。 这个承载方式需要通过以下方向成熟：觉醒不是优越，觉醒是服务。让觉醒回到生活中，用真理照亮最平凡的地方。
S3-04.expressionModeEN: Soul awakening begins to manifest. The person starts seeing through illusion and understanding the logic of energy.
S3-04.expressionModeZH: 灵魂觉醒正在显化，开始看破幻相、理解能量逻辑。
S3-04.distortionRiskEN: Spiritual arrogance, judging others, and overemphasizing awakening while neglecting grounded daily embodiment.
S3-04.distortionRiskZH: 容易傲慢、容易评判他人、过度强调觉醒而忽略生活落地。
S3-04.groundingActionEN: Awakening is not superiority; awakening is service. Let awakening return to ordinary life and let truth illuminate the simplest places.
S3-04.groundingActionZH: 觉醒不是优越，觉醒是服务。让觉醒回到生活中，用真理照亮最平凡的地方。

S3-05.carrierSeedEN: Your mission is carried through the Integrator vibration: The soul begins integrating emotions, relationships, wounds, and shadow material. This carrier matures through: Integration comes through gentleness, not force. Let every emotion become a practice.
S3-05.carrierSeedZH: 你的使命会通过「整合者」的振动来承载：灵魂开始整合：情绪、关系、创伤、阴影。 这个承载方式需要通过以下方向成熟：整合来自温柔，而不是强迫；让每一次情绪都成为练习。
S3-05.expressionModeEN: The soul begins integrating emotions, relationships, wounds, and shadow material.
S3-05.expressionModeZH: 灵魂开始整合：情绪、关系、创伤、阴影。
S3-05.distortionRiskEN: The tendency to avoid old wounds and recurring lessons, often due to fear of being hurt again.
S3-05.distortionRiskZH: 面对旧伤旧课题时会想逃避；害怕再次受伤。
S3-05.groundingActionEN: Integration comes through gentleness, not force. Let every emotion become a practice.
S3-05.groundingActionZH: 整合来自温柔，而不是强迫；让每一次情绪都成为练习。

S3-06.carrierSeedEN: Your mission is carried through the Alchemist vibration: A transformative capacity emerges: pain can be turned into strength, and difficulty into wisdom. This carrier matures through: You do not need to carry everyone’s transformation. Learn boundaries and let power move naturally.
S3-06.carrierSeedZH: 你的使命会通过「炼金者」的振动来承载：拥有转化能力，可以将痛变力量、将困境变智慧。 这个承载方式需要通过以下方向成熟：不需要承担所有人的转化；学习界限，让力量自然流动。
S3-06.expressionModeEN: A transformative capacity emerges: pain can be turned into strength, and difficulty into wisdom.
S3-06.expressionModeZH: 拥有转化能力，可以将痛变力量、将困境变智慧。
S3-06.distortionRiskEN: Carrying too much alone, repressing emotion, and stepping too quickly into the role of rescuer or savior.
S3-06.distortionRiskZH: 容易独自承担太多、倾向压抑情绪、太早承担救赎角色。
S3-06.groundingActionEN: You do not need to carry everyone’s transformation. Learn boundaries and let power move naturally.
S3-06.groundingActionZH: 不需要承担所有人的转化；学习界限，让力量自然流动。

S3-07.carrierSeedEN: Your mission is carried through the Visionary vibration: The soul begins to carry mission, vision, and a stronger sense of direction. This carrier matures through: Release attachment to outcome. Let vision become service rather than proof.
S3-07.carrierSeedZH: 你的使命会通过「远见者」的振动来承载：灵魂开始拥有使命感、愿景、方向性。 这个承载方式需要通过以下方向成熟：放下对结果的执着，让愿景成为服务而不是证明。
S3-07.expressionModeEN: The soul begins to carry mission, vision, and a stronger sense of direction.
S3-07.expressionModeZH: 灵魂开始拥有使命感、愿景、方向性。
S3-07.distortionRiskEN: Anxiety about not being good enough, mission inflation, and subtle ego entering the vision.
S3-07.distortionRiskZH: 容易焦虑“还不够好”、使命过度膨胀、小我悄悄混进来。
S3-07.groundingActionEN: Release attachment to outcome. Let vision become service rather than proof.
S3-07.groundingActionZH: 放下对结果的执着，让愿景成为服务而不是证明。

S3-08.carrierSeedEN: Your mission is carried through the Healer vibration: The soul enters a healing frequency, bringing repair and inspiration through connection with others. This carrier matures through: Let healing begin with boundaries. Do not absorb; accompany. Do not rescue; remain present.
S3-08.carrierSeedZH: 你的使命会通过「疗愈者」的振动来承载：灵魂进入疗愈频率，与他人连接时带来修复与启发。 这个承载方式需要通过以下方向成熟：让疗愈从界限开始，不吸收，只陪伴，不拯救。
S3-08.expressionModeEN: The soul enters a healing frequency, bringing repair and inspiration through connection with others.
S3-08.expressionModeZH: 灵魂进入疗愈频率，与他人连接时带来修复与启发。
S3-08.distortionRiskEN: Over-empathy, energetic depletion, and absorbing the pain of others.
S3-08.distortionRiskZH: 情绪共感过度、能量被吸走、吸收他人痛苦。
S3-08.groundingActionEN: Let healing begin with boundaries. Do not absorb; accompany. Do not rescue; remain present.
S3-08.groundingActionZH: 让疗愈从界限开始，不吸收，只陪伴，不拯救。

S3-09.carrierSeedEN: Your mission is carried through the Mentor vibration: The soul carries the ability to transmit wisdom and influence the awareness of others. This carrier matures through: Be a mirror, not a master. Let others become the source of their own strength.
S3-09.carrierSeedZH: 你的使命会通过「导师」的振动来承载：灵魂具有传递智慧的能力，影响他人意识。 这个承载方式需要通过以下方向成熟：做镜子，而不是主人。让他人成为自己的力量来源。
S3-09.expressionModeEN: The soul carries the ability to transmit wisdom and influence the awareness of others.
S3-09.expressionModeZH: 灵魂具有传递智慧的能力，影响他人意识。
S3-09.distortionRiskEN: Over-responsibility, fatigue, and becoming an object of spiritual dependency for others.
S3-09.distortionRiskZH: 容易过度负责、容易疲惫、容易变成精神依赖对象。
S3-09.groundingActionEN: Be a mirror, not a master. Let others become the source of their own strength.
S3-09.groundingActionZH: 做镜子，而不是主人。让他人成为自己的力量来源。

S3-10.carrierSeedEN: Your mission is carried through the Master vibration: The soul is highly self-aware; life, language, and presence themselves become teaching. This carrier matures through: Continue to be light, not a leader. Light simply illuminates; it does not judge or expect.
S3-10.carrierSeedZH: 你的使命会通过「精通者」的振动来承载：灵魂高度自觉，生活、言语、存在本身就是教学。 这个承载方式需要通过以下方向成熟：继续做光，而不是做领袖。光只是照亮，不判断、不期待。
S3-10.expressionModeEN: The soul is highly self-aware; life, language, and presence themselves become teaching.
S3-10.expressionModeZH: 灵魂高度自觉，生活、言语、存在本身就是教学。
S3-10.distortionRiskEN: Loneliness when facing collective unconsciousness and the feeling of being deeply misunderstood.
S3-10.distortionRiskZH: 面对集体无明时容易感到孤独；容易觉得无人理解。
S3-10.groundingActionEN: Continue to be light, not a leader. Light simply illuminates; it does not judge or expect.
S3-10.groundingActionZH: 继续做光，而不是做领袖。光只是照亮，不判断、不期待。

S3-11.carrierSeedEN: Your mission is carried through the Ascendant vibration: The soul begins moving beyond the personal level into service to the collective and to consciousness itself. This carrier matures through: Return to the body, to rest, and to self-nourishment so you can continue holding a larger frequency.
S3-11.carrierSeedZH: 你的使命会通过「扬升者」的振动来承载：灵魂开始超越个人层次，进入服务集体、服务意识的阶段。 这个承载方式需要通过以下方向成熟：回到身体、回到休息、回到自我滋养，才能继续承载更大的频率。
S3-11.expressionModeEN: The soul begins moving beyond the personal level into service to the collective and to consciousness itself.
S3-11.expressionModeZH: 灵魂开始超越个人层次，进入服务集体、服务意识的阶段。
S3-11.distortionRiskEN: High pressure on the body, significant energetic consumption, and occasional soul-level fatigue.
S3-11.distortionRiskZH: 身体承载压力大、能量消耗高、偶尔出现灵魂疲惫感。
S3-11.groundingActionEN: Return to the body, to rest, and to self-nourishment so you can continue holding a larger frequency.
S3-11.groundingActionZH: 回到身体、回到休息、回到自我滋养，才能继续承载更大的频率。

S3-12.carrierSeedEN: Your mission is carried through the Source-Channel vibration: The soul becomes a channel of Source, functioning through wisdom, love, and truth with minimal ego interference. This carrier matures through: Do not dwell in form or self. Let truth continue to move through you with a non-forcing heart.
S3-12.carrierSeedZH: 你的使命会通过「源头通道」的振动来承载：灵魂成为“源头的通道”，没有小我的干扰，纯粹以智慧、爱与真理运作。 这个承载方式需要通过以下方向成熟：不住于相，不住于我，以无为之心继续让真理流过你。
S3-12.expressionModeEN: The soul becomes a channel of Source, functioning through wisdom, love, and truth with minimal ego interference.
S3-12.expressionModeZH: 灵魂成为“源头的通道”，没有小我的干扰，纯粹以智慧、爱与真理运作。
S3-12.distortionRiskEN: The need to remain empty and non-attached; attachment to being high-frequency can pull the expression back into lower patterns.
S3-12.distortionRiskZH: 必须持续保持空性，不可执着“成为高频”，否则会跌回低阶。
S3-12.groundingActionEN: Do not dwell in form or self. Let truth continue to move through you with a non-forcing heart.
S3-12.groundingActionZH: 不住于相，不住于我，以无为之心继续让真理流过你。

S0-00.voidChallengeSeedEN: Your key mission challenge is to awaken through Zero Point Archetype: Everything must be obtained from the outside world. The return path is: Stabilize presence and practice “doing nothing.”
S0-00.voidChallengeSeedZH: 你的关键使命考验，是通过「零点原型」觉醒：一切都必须从外界获得。 回归路径是：稳定存在，练习“什么也不做”。
S0-00.coreIllusionEN: Everything must be obtained from the outside world.
S0-00.coreIllusionZH: 一切都必须从外界获得。
S0-00.voidChallengeEN: Unable to stop, continuously seeking confirmation.
S0-00.voidChallengeZH: 无法停下来，持续寻求确认。
S0-00.breakthroughGateEN: The ability to return completely to the inner center.
S0-00.breakthroughGateZH: 完全回到内在中心的能力。
S0-00.returnPracticeZH: 稳定存在，练习“什么也不做”。

S0-01.voidChallengeSeedEN: Your key mission challenge is to awaken through Existence Illusion: Feeling that you are not good enough or not valuable enough. The return path is: Practice not proving yourself.
S0-01.voidChallengeSeedZH: 你的关键使命考验，是通过「存在幻象」觉醒：觉得自己不够好，不够有价值。 回归路径是：练习不证明自己。
S0-01.coreIllusionEN: Feeling that you are not good enough or not valuable enough.
S0-01.coreIllusionZH: 觉得自己不够好，不够有价值。
S0-01.voidChallengeZH: 自我价值依赖外部评价。

S0-02.voidChallengeSeedEN: Your key mission challenge is to awaken through Control Illusion: Believing everything must be controlled in order to feel safe. The return path is: Practice allowing things to unfold naturally.
S0-02.voidChallengeSeedZH: 你的关键使命考验，是通过「控制幻象」觉醒：认为必须掌控一切才会安全。 回归路径是：练习允许事情自然发生。
S0-02.coreIllusionEN: Believing everything must be controlled in order to feel safe.
S0-02.coreIllusionZH: 认为必须掌控一切才会安全。
S0-02.breakthroughGateEN: The power of letting go and flowing with life.
S0-02.returnPracticeEN: Practice allowing things to unfold naturally.
S0-02.returnPracticeZH: 练习允许事情自然发生。

S0-03.voidChallengeSeedEN: Your key mission challenge is to awaken through Separation Illusion: Believing that you are separate from the world. The return path is: Replace defense with openness.
S0-03.voidChallengeSeedZH: 你的关键使命考验，是通过「分离幻象」觉醒：认为自己与世界分离。 回归路径是：用开放取代防御。
S0-03.coreIllusionEN: Believing that you are separate from the world.
S0-03.breakthroughGateEN: The ability to build connection and a sense of unity.

S0-04.voidChallengeSeedEN: Your key mission challenge is to awaken through Perfection Illusion: Believing you must be perfect in order to be loved. The return path is: See the beauty of imperfection.
S0-04.voidChallengeSeedZH: 你的关键使命考验，是通过「完美幻象」觉醒：认为必须做到完美才值得被爱。 回归路径是：看见不完美的美。
S0-04.coreIllusionEN: Believing you must be perfect in order to be loved.
S0-04.coreIllusionZH: 认为必须做到完美才值得被爱。
S0-04.breakthroughGateEN: The ability to accept your real self.

S0-05.voidChallengeSeedEN: Your key mission challenge is to awaken through Emotional Illusion: Believing emotions are the same as truth. The return path is: Practice conscious breathing and separation from emotional identification.
S0-05.voidChallengeSeedZH: 你的关键使命考验，是通过「情绪幻象」觉醒：情绪等于真相。 回归路径是：练习觉知呼吸与情绪分离。
S0-05.coreIllusionEN: Believing emotions are the same as truth.
S0-05.breakthroughGateEN: The ability to become the observer of emotions.
S0-05.returnPracticeEN: Practice conscious breathing and separation from emotional identification.
S0-05.returnPracticeZH: 练习觉知呼吸与情绪分离。

S0-06.voidChallengeSeedEN: Your key mission challenge is to awaken through Role Illusion: Equating yourself with an identity or role. The return path is: Release identity labels.
S0-06.voidChallengeSeedZH: 你的关键使命考验，是通过「角色幻象」觉醒：将自己等同于身份或角色。 回归路径是：放下身份标签。
S0-06.coreIllusionEN: Equating yourself with an identity or role.
S0-06.coreIllusionZH: 将自己等同于身份或角色。
S0-06.breakthroughGateEN: The ability to return to being itself.

S0-07.voidChallengeSeedEN: Your key mission challenge is to awaken through Self-Worth Illusion: Feeling that you are never enough. The return path is: Practice gratitude and allowing.
S0-07.voidChallengeSeedZH: 你的关键使命考验，是通过「自我价值幻象」觉醒：觉得自己永远不够。 回归路径是：练习感恩与允许。
S0-07.coreIllusionEN: Feeling that you are never enough.
S0-07.breakthroughGateEN: The ability to see your own light.

S0-08.voidChallengeSeedEN: Your key mission challenge is to awaken through Attachment Illusion: Believing happiness must come from relationships. The return path is: Return to your own inner security.
S0-08.voidChallengeSeedZH: 你的关键使命考验，是通过「依附幻象」觉醒：认为幸福必须来自关系。 回归路径是：回到自身的内在安全感。
S0-08.coreIllusionEN: Believing happiness must come from relationships.
S0-08.coreIllusionZH: 认为幸福必须来自关系。
S0-08.voidChallengeEN: A tendency to depend on others.
S0-08.returnPracticeEN: Return to your own inner security.
S0-08.returnPracticeZH: 回到自身的内在安全感。

S0-09.voidChallengeSeedEN: Your key mission challenge is to awaken through Judgment Illusion: Believing others’ opinions matter more than your own truth. The return path is: Stop asking the outside world, “Am I okay?”
S0-09.voidChallengeSeedZH: 你的关键使命考验，是通过「评价幻象」觉醒：你相信他人的眼光比自己的真实更重要。 回归路径是：停止向外询问“我好吗”。
S0-09.coreIllusionEN: Believing others’ opinions matter more than your own truth.
S0-09.coreIllusionZH: 你相信他人的眼光比自己的真实更重要。
S0-09.breakthroughGateEN: The ability to define your own value.
S0-09.returnPracticeEN: Stop asking the outside world, “Am I okay?”

S0-10.voidChallengeSeedEN: Your key mission challenge is to awaken through Time Illusion: Fear of being too late or missing out. The return path is: Return to this moment.
S0-10.voidChallengeSeedZH: 你的关键使命考验，是通过「时间幻象」觉醒：害怕来不及、害怕错过。 回归路径是：回到此刻。
S0-10.coreIllusionEN: Fear of being too late or missing out.
S0-10.voidChallengeEN: Anxiety about the future and difficulty being present.

S0-11.voidChallengeSeedEN: Your key mission challenge is to awaken through Responsibility Illusion: Believing you must carry everything. The return path is: Carry only what belongs to you.
S0-11.voidChallengeSeedZH: 你的关键使命考验，是通过「责任幻象」觉醒：认为必须承担一切。 回归路径是：只承担属于你的部分。
S0-11.returnPracticeEN: Carry only what belongs to you.

S0-12.voidChallengeSeedEN: Your key mission challenge is to awaken through Comparison Illusion: Defining yourself through comparison. The return path is: Return from image to soul essence.
S0-12.voidChallengeSeedZH: 你的关键使命考验，是通过「比较幻象」觉醒：通过比较定义自己。 回归路径是：从形象回到灵魂本质。
S0-12.voidChallengeEN: A cycle of inferiority and superiority.
S0-12.breakthroughGateZH: 自我稳定与独立价值感。
S0-12.returnPracticeEN: Return from image to soul essence.

S0-13.voidChallengeSeedEN: Your key mission challenge is to awaken through Meaning Illusion: Believing life must have a “great purpose.” The return path is: Return from goal-orientation to being.
S0-13.voidChallengeSeedZH: 你的关键使命考验，是通过「意义幻象」觉醒：认为生命必须有“伟大目的”。 回归路径是：从目标感回到存在。
S0-13.coreIllusionEN: Believing life must have a “great purpose.”
S0-13.coreIllusionZH: 认为生命必须有“伟大目的”。
S0-13.voidChallengeZH: 对成就与意义过度执着。
S0-13.breakthroughGateEN: The ability to see truth in the ordinary.

S0-14.voidChallengeSeedEN: Your key mission challenge is to awaken through Guilt Illusion: Feeling that you must compensate or atone. The return path is: Release the weight of past memories.
S0-14.voidChallengeSeedZH: 你的关键使命考验，是通过「愧疚幻象」觉醒：觉得自己需要补偿、赎罪。 回归路径是：放下过往记忆的重量。
S0-14.coreIllusionEN: Feeling that you must compensate or atone.
S0-14.coreIllusionZH: 觉得自己需要补偿、赎罪。
S0-14.returnPracticeEN: Release the weight of past memories.

S0-15.voidChallengeSeedEN: Your key mission challenge is to awaken through Loneliness Illusion: Feeling that no one understands or truly sees you. The return path is: Return from seeking connection outside to inner companionship.
S0-15.voidChallengeSeedZH: 你的关键使命考验，是通过「孤独幻象」觉醒：觉得没人理解、没人能看见你。 回归路径是：从外求连接回到内在陪伴。
S0-15.coreIllusionEN: Feeling that no one understands or truly sees you.
S0-15.coreIllusionZH: 觉得没人理解、没人能看见你。
S0-15.breakthroughGateEN: The ability to connect with yourself.
S0-15.returnPracticeEN: Return from seeking connection outside to inner companionship.
S0-15.returnPracticeZH: 从外求连接回到内在陪伴。

S0-16.voidChallengeSeedEN: Your key mission challenge is to awaken through Blame Illusion: Attributing pain to others. The return path is: Let others step out of your story.
S0-16.voidChallengeSeedZH: 你的关键使命考验，是通过「控诉幻象」觉醒：将痛苦归因于他人。 回归路径是：让他人从你的故事中退出。
S0-16.breakthroughGateEN: The ability to take responsibility for your own emotions and choices.
S0-16.returnPracticeEN: Let others step out of your story.
S0-16.returnPracticeZH: 让他人从你的故事中退出。

S0-17.voidChallengeSeedEN: Your key mission challenge is to awaken through Self-Denial Illusion: “I am not worthy” / “I am not good enough.” The return path is: Use awareness to see your own light.
S0-17.voidChallengeSeedZH: 你的关键使命考验，是通过「自我否定幻象」觉醒：“我不值得”、“我不够好”。 回归路径是：用觉知看见自己的光。
S0-17.coreIllusionEN: “I am not worthy” / “I am not good enough.”
S0-17.voidChallengeEN: Deep denial of one’s own worth.
S0-17.returnPracticeEN: Use awareness to see your own light.

S0-18.voidChallengeSeedEN: Your key mission challenge is to awaken through Effort Illusion: Believing effort can earn everything. The return path is: Return from “doing more” to “being yourself.”
S0-18.voidChallengeSeedZH: 你的关键使命考验，是通过「努力幻象」觉醒：相信努力可以换来一切。 回归路径是：从“做更多”回到“成为自己”。
S0-18.coreIllusionZH: 相信努力可以换来一切。
S0-18.breakthroughGateEN: The wisdom of flow and allowing.
S0-18.returnPracticeZH: 从“做更多”回到“成为自己”。

S0-19.voidChallengeSeedEN: Your key mission challenge is to awaken through Survival Illusion: Believing the world is dangerous and must be defended against. The return path is: Practice relaxing, breathing, and trusting.
S0-19.voidChallengeSeedZH: 你的关键使命考验，是通过「生存幻象」觉醒：认为世界是危险的，必须防御。 回归路径是：练习放松、呼吸、信任。
S0-19.coreIllusionEN: Believing the world is dangerous and must be defended against.
S0-19.coreIllusionZH: 认为世界是危险的，必须防御。
